Returns available entitlements for sync. Payload follows the external entitlements contract.

post.summary: Assign entitlement to user
post.description: Assigns an entitlement to a user. Idempotent behavior: existing assignment is updated and returns 200.

get.description: Returns the current entitlement assignment for one user + identifier tuple.

put.description: Updates (or creates) a single entitlement assignment for one user + identifier tuple.

delete.description: Revokes the entitlement assignment. Idempotent: missing assignment still returns success.

Legacy endpoint returning active user roles with permissions.

get.summary: Get entitlement sync context by shop assignment id
get.description: Returns the persisted entitlement-sync context row (shop linkage + local assignment references) for a given x-shop-assignment-id.
Returns deterministic usage-overage events for shop-initiated pull billing sync. Endpoint is idempotent via stable externalEventId per event snapshot.
